treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for evaluation of postoperative wound infection
Underwent ultrasound which showed a fluid collection
Decision made to proceed to the operating room for drainage

patient_outcome.final_status: Alert and interactive, but with ongoing issues
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with Neurology and primary care physician
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Risk factors for future strokes identified
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Activity status: Out of bed with assistance
